commands.review_summary:
The PR moves CLI subcommand action/runtime imports behind lazy action imports and adds cold-import regression coverage for `gateway`, `doctor`, `status`, and `health` help paths.

Reproducibility: Partially: source inspection shows current main eagerly imports the suspected gateway/status/doctor runtime modules before help rendering, and the PR adds a focused cold-import regression test. I did not reproduce the original Fedora 44 rootless Podman segfault in a live container.
commands.review_followup: Protected `maintainer` label and `mergeable: false` make this a human maintainer handling item; I found no narrow automated repair blocker in the diff.

target.title: fix(cli): keep subcommand help lightweight
target.body:
Summary
- Keep `openclaw gateway --help`, `doctor --help`, `status --help`, and `health --help` on metadata-only registration paths.
- Move gateway run/call/discover/progress and status/doctor command implementations behind lazy action imports.
- Add cold-import regression coverage for the affected help paths.

Verification
Behavior addressed: Subcommand help no longer imports gateway/status/doctor action/runtime modules before rendering help.
Real environment tested: macOS local checkout plus delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/cli/help-cold-imports.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/register.option-collisions.test.ts src/cli/program/register.subclis.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm openclaw gateway --help`; `pnpm openclaw doctor --help`; `pnpm openclaw status --help`; `pnpm openclaw health --help`; `pnpm check:changed`; `codex-review --mode local`
Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 5 files / 123 tests; help commands rendered successfully; Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01krw5swxnsy57a2yh51ejc7v4` passed via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26006404609; codex review reported no actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Help output renders without invoking the mocked gateway/doctor/status/health action modules in regression tests.
What was not tested: Fedora 44 rootless Podman native segfault reproduction was not available locally. A `pnpm build` attempted by codex-review hit a transient `fetch failed`, so build proof is covered by the changed gate instead.

Fixes #83228
target.author: steipete
